_comment: v2: for firmware 1.1.0+ with the reworked trigger (two instant paths + leaky weak-signal integrator). Threshold = noise floor + TRIG_OFFSET (single margin; TRIG_KSIGMA is inactive/compat-only). TRIG_MIN_AREA is inactive/compat-only (covered by TRIG_MIN_FRACTION x TRIG_MIN_MEAN_EXCESS). TRIG_MIN_RUN is a FRACTION of the guarded band's available bins required as a contiguous run, NOT a raw bin count (reworked for scale-invariance across equipment with different channel bandwidths). TRIG_WEAK_CONFIRM is the integrator confirm level. These values are NOT comparable to tuningdefaults.json's v1 scale — devices on older firmware must keep using tuningdefaults.json. The module will automatically update to these settings on first flash, or if the version increases thereafter.
